/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/app.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/Todo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/TodoList.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/utils.cpp.o -o app  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libftxui-component.7.0.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libftxui-dom.7.0.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libftxui-screen.7.0.0.dylib
